title: Subterra
description:
Welcome to Subterra!﻿

Subterra is a cave-focused worldgen datapack that adds a number of unique new cave biomes and structures inside of your world, with secrets to discover and advancements to be made by discovering these new environments!
body:
# Welcome to Subterra!﻿

Subterra is a cave-focused worldgen datapack that adds a number of unique new cave biomes and structures inside of your world, with secrets to discover and advancements to be made by discovering these new environments!

Venture deep into volcanic regions and you'll find the **Magmatic Caverns**, boiling chambers of lava that may contain rare gems and ancient Dwarven fortresses...  
Under the thickest of forests lies the **Darkwoods**, a sinister overgrowth containing poisonous threats and curious covens...  
Where dunes cover the landscape, they also extend below the surface into the **Sandswept Caves**, wide caverns of long-buried trinkets and fossils...  
In the high, cold peaks and meadows, a brief place of solace can be found in the **Hot Springs**, gently illuminated by candlelight with cherry blossoms floating on the wind...  
The roots of the exotic mushroom isles grow deep into the **Mushroom Caves**, a monster-free environment ripe with glowing fungi...  
And below the eroded valleys and swamps can be found the dead, barren wastes of the **Petrified Hollow** and its dark catacombs...  

The pack also has compatibility with both *Terralith* and *Cavernous*, so you can tailor your caving experience further!

What will you find? What other treasures and threats hide deep in your world? There's only one way to find out...
